ayahs.textArabic: هَلۡ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلۡإِنسَٰنِ حِينٞ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهۡرِ لَمۡ يَكُن شَيۡـٔٗا مَّذۡكُورًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Hal ata AAala alinsani heenun mina alddahri lam yakun shayan mathkooran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Is there not a period of time when each human is nothing yet worth mentioning?

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ مِن نُّطۡفَةٍ أَمۡشَاجٖ نَّبۡتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ سَمِيعَۢا بَصِيرًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna khalaqna alinsana min nutfatin amshajin nabtaleehi fajaAAalnahu sameeAAan baseeran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹For˺ indeed, We ˹alone˺ created humans from a drop of mixed fluids, ˹in order˺ to test them, so We made them hear and see.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّا هَدَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرٗا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna hadaynahu alssabeela imma shakiran waimma kafooran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We already showed them the Way, whether they ˹choose to˺ be grateful or ungrateful.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّآ أَعۡتَدۡنَا لِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ سَلَٰسِلَاْ وَأَغۡلَٰلٗا وَسَعِيرًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna aAAtadna lilkafireena salasila waaghlalan wasaAAeeran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers chains and shackles and a blaze.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers chains, shackles, and a blazing Fire.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارَ يَشۡرَبُونَ مِن كَأۡسٖ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna alabrara yashraboona min kasin kana mizajuha kafooran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kafur,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, the virtuous will have a drink ˹of pure wine˺—flavoured with camphor—

ayahs.textArabic: عَيۡنٗا يَشۡرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفۡجِيرٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: AAaynan yashrabu biha AAibadu Allahi yufajjiroonaha tafjeeran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allah will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹from˺ a spring where Allah’s servants will drink, flowing at their will.

ayahs.textArabic: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذۡرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوۡمٗا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسۡتَطِيرٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Yoofoona bialnnathri wayakhafoona yawman kana sharruhu mustateeran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: They ˹are those who˺ fulfil ˹their˺ vows and fear a Day of sweeping horror,

ayahs.textArabic: وَيُطۡعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسۡكِينٗا وَيَتِيمٗا وَأَسِيرًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: WayutAAimona alttaAAama AAala hubbihi miskeenan wayateeman waaseeran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and give food—despite their desire for it—to the poor, the orphan, and the captive,

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّمَا نُطۡعِمُكُمۡ لِوَجۡهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمۡ جَزَآءٗ وَلَا شُكُورًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Innama nutAAimukum liwajhi Allahi la nureedu minkum jazaan wala shukooran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Saying], "We feed you only for the countenance of Allah. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹saying to themselves,˺ “We feed you only for the sake of Allah, seeking neither reward nor thanks from you.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوۡمًا عَبُوسٗا قَمۡطَرِيرٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna nakhafu min rabbina yawman AAaboosan qamtareeran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We fear from our Lord a horribly distressful Day.”

ayahs.textArabic: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمۡ نَضۡرَةٗ وَسُرُورٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Fawaqahumu Allahu sharra thalika alyawmi walaqqahum nadratan wasurooran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So Allah will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So Allah will deliver them from the horror of that Day, and grant them radiance and joy,

ayahs.textArabic: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُواْ جَنَّةٗ وَحَرِيرٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wajazahum bima sabaroo jannatan wahareeran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and reward them for their perseverance with a Garden ˹in Paradise˺ and ˹garments of˺ silk.

ayahs.textArabic: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَآئِكِۖ لَا يَرَوۡنَ فِيهَا شَمۡسٗا وَلَا زَمۡهَرِيرٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Muttakieena feeha AAala alaraiki la yarawna feeha shamsan wala zamhareeran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [They will be] reclining therein on adorned couches. They will not see therein any [burning] sun or [freezing] cold.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: There they will be reclining on ˹canopied˺ couches, never seeing scorching heat or bitter cold.

ayahs.textArabic: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيۡهِمۡ ظِلَٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتۡ قُطُوفُهَا تَذۡلِيلٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wadaniyatan AAalayhim thilaluha wathullilat qutoofuha tathleelan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: The Garden’s shade will be right above them, and its fruit will be made very easy to reach.

ayahs.textArabic: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٖ مِّن فِضَّةٖ وَأَكۡوَابٖ كَانَتۡ قَوَارِيرَا۠
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wayutafu AAalayhim bianiyatin min fiddatin waakwabin kanat qawareera
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass],
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: They will be waited on with silver vessels and cups of crystal—

ayahs.textArabic: قَوَارِيرَاْ مِن فِضَّةٖ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقۡدِيرٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qawareera min fiddatin qaddarooha taqdeeran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: crystalline silver, filled precisely as desired.

ayahs.textArabic: وَيُسۡقَوۡنَ فِيهَا كَأۡسٗا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wayusqawna feeha kasan kana mizajuha zanjabeelan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And they will be given a drink ˹of pure wine˺ flavoured with ginger

ayahs.textArabic: عَيۡنٗا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلۡسَبِيلٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: AAaynan feeha tusamma salsabeelan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [From] a fountain within Paradise named Salsabeel.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: from a spring there, called Salsabîl.

ayahs.textArabic: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وِلۡدَٰنٞ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيۡتَهُمۡ حَسِبۡتَهُمۡ لُؤۡلُؤٗا مَّنثُورٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wayatoofu AAalayhim wildanun mukhalladoona itha raaytahum hasibtahum luluan manthooran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: They will be waited on by eternal youths. If you saw them, you would think they were scattered pearls.

ayahs.textArabic: وَإِذَا رَأَيۡتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيۡتَ نَعِيمٗا وَمُلۡكٗا كَبِيرًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waitha raayta thamma raayta naAAeeman wamulkan kabeeran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And if you looked around, you would see ˹indescribable˺ bliss and a vast kingdom.

ayahs.textArabic: عَٰلِيَهُمۡ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضۡرٞ وَإِسۡتَبۡرَقٞۖ وَحُلُّوٓاْ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٖ وَسَقَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ شَرَابٗا طَهُورًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: AAaliyahum thiyabu sundusin khudrun waistabraqun wahulloo asawira min fiddatin wasaqahum rabbuhum sharaban tahooran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Upon the inhabitants will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: The virtuous will be ˹dressed˺ in garments of fine green silk and rich brocade, and adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمۡ جَزَآءٗ وَكَانَ سَعۡيُكُم مَّشۡكُورًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna hatha kana lakum jazaan wakana saAAyukum mashkooran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹And they will be told,˺ “All this is surely a reward for you. Your striving has been appreciated.”

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ تَنزِيلٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna nahnu nazzalna AAalayka alqurana tanzeelan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muhammad], the Qur'an progressively.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, it is We Who have revealed the Quran to you ˹O Prophet˺ in stages.

ayahs.textArabic: فَٱصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعۡ مِنۡهُمۡ ءَاثِمًا أَوۡ كَفُورٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Faisbir lihukmi rabbika wala tutiAA minhum athiman aw kafooran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So be patient with your Lord’s decree, and do not yield to any evildoer or ˹staunch˺ disbeliever from among them.

ayahs.textArabic: وَٱذۡكُرِ ٱسۡمَ رَبِّكَ بُكۡرَةٗ وَأَصِيلٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waothkuri isma rabbika bukratan waaseelan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹Always˺ remember the Name of your Lord morning and evening,

ayahs.textArabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَٱسۡجُدۡ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحۡهُ لَيۡلٗا طَوِيلًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wamina allayli faosjud lahu wasabbihhu laylan taweelan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And during the night prostrate to Him and exalt Him a long [part of the] night.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and prostrate before Him during part of the night, and glorify Him long at night.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلۡعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمۡ يَوۡمٗا ثَقِيلٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna haolai yuhibboona alAAajilata wayatharoona waraahum yawman thaqeelan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, these [disbelievers] love the immediate and leave behind them a grave Day.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely those ˹pagans˺ love this fleeting world, ˹totally˺ neglecting a weighty Day ahead of them.

ayahs.textArabic: نَّحۡنُ خَلَقۡنَٰهُمۡ وَشَدَدۡنَآ أَسۡرَهُمۡۖ وَإِذَا شِئۡنَا بَدَّلۡنَآ أَمۡثَٰلَهُمۡ تَبۡدِيلًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Nahnu khalaqnahum washadadna asrahum waitha shina baddalna amthalahum tabdeelan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: It is We Who created them and perfected their ˹physical˺ form. But if We will, We can easily replace them with others.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦ تَذۡكِرَةٞۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna hathihi tathkiratun faman shaa ittakhatha ila rabbihi sabeelan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Surely this is a reminder. So let whoever wills take the ˹Right˺ Way to their Lord.

ayahs.textArabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wama tashaoona illa an yashaa Allahu inna Allaha kana AAaleeman hakeeman
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And you do not will except that Allah wills. Indeed, Allah is ever Knowing and Wise.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: But you cannot will ˹to do so˺ unless Allah wills. Indeed, Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.

ayahs.textArabic: يُدۡخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِي رَحۡمَتِهِۦۚ وَٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ عَذَابًا أَلِيمَۢا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Yudkhilu man yashao fee rahmatihi waalththalimeena aAAadda lahum AAathaban aleeman
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He admits whom He wills into His mercy; but the wrongdoers - He has prepared for them a painful punishment.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: He admits whoever He wills into His mercy. As for the wrongdoers, He has prepared for them a painful punishment
